mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, created_at FROM carts WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO carts (user_id) VALUES (#{userId}) RETURNING id, user_id, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT ci.id, ci.cart_id, ci.product_id, ci.quantity, p.name AS product_name, p.price, p.stock, p.images, p.status AS product_status, fp.name AS farmer_name FROM cart_items ci JOIN products p ON p.id = ci.product_id JOIN farmer_profiles fp ON fp.id = p.farmer_id WHERE ci.cart_id = #{cartId} ORDER BY ci.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_items (cart_id, product_id, quantity) VALUES (#{cartId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}) ON CONFLICT (cart_id, product_id) DO UPDATE SET quantity = cart_items.quantity + #{quantity} RETURNING id, cart_id, product_id, quantity
mapper.update: UPDATE cart_items SET quantity = #{quantity} WHERE id = #{itemId} AND cart_id = #{cartId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart_items WHERE id = #{itemId} AND cart_id = #{cartId}
